activities.name: Execute Pipeline Call PHI Coatings ASAP

scripts.text:
SELECT AGENT_NAME,AGENT_GROUP
INTO #T_1
FROM
(
	SELECT  
	AGENT_NAME,
	AGENT_GROUP,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY AGENT_NAME ORDER BY DATE DESC) AS RW
	FROM EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL 
	WHERE AGENT_NAME IS NOT NULL 
	AND AGENT_GROUP IS NOT NULL
	) MX
    WHERE RW=1;



UPDATE A
SET A.AgentGroup_Five9 = B.AGENT_GROUP
FROM
EDW.DIM_FIVE9_AGENT_GROUP_MAPPING A
LEFT JOIN #T_1 B
ON A.AgentName_Five9 = B.AGENT_NAME
OR COALESCE(A.AgentName_Corrected,'NX1') = B.AGENT_NAME
WHERE B.AGENT_GROUP != A.AgentGroup_Five9;



--***************************************************
--***************************************************



SELECT AGENT_NAME,AGENT AS EMAIL_Five9
INTO #T_2
FROM
(
	SELECT  
	AGENT_NAME,
	AGENT,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY AGENT_NAME ORDER BY DATE DESC) AS RW
	FROM EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL 
	WHERE AGENT_NAME IS NOT NULL 
	AND AGENT IS NOT NULL
	) MX
    WHERE RW=1



UPDATE A
SET A.Email_Five9 = B.EMAIL_Five9
FROM
EDW.DIM_FIVE9_AGENT_GROUP_MAPPING A
LEFT JOIN #T_2 B
ON A.AgentName_Five9 = B.AGENT_NAME
OR COALESCE(A.AgentName_Corrected,'NX1') = B.AGENT_NAME;

WITH M1 AS 
(
SELECT AgentName_Five9,COUNT(1) AS CT 
FROM  EDW.DIM_FIVE9_AGENT_GROUP_MAPPING
GROUP BY AgentName_Five9
HAVING COUNT(1)>1
	),

M2 AS 
( 
SELECT A.AgentName_Five9,A.Division,COUNT(1) AS Ct
FROM EDW.DIM_FIVE9_AGENT_GROUP_MAPPING A 
JOIN EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL B
ON A.AgentName_Five9 = B.Agent_Name
AND A.Division = B.Division
WHERE A.AgentName_Five9 IN (SELECT AgentName_Five9 FROM M1)
GROUP BY A.AgentName_Five9,A.Division
),

M3 AS 
(
SELECT AgentName_Five9,Division
FROM
(
SELECT *,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY AgentName_Five9 ORDER BY CT DESC) AS RW
FROM M2 
) A
WHERE RW>1  -- Delete duplicate based on Count of Calls

) 


DELETE T
FROM EDW.DIM_FIVE9_AGENT_GROUP_MAPPING T
JOIN M3
    ON T.AgentName_Five9 = M3.AgentName_Five9
   AND T.Division = M3.Division;




--*************************************


DELETE A
FROM EDW.DIM_FIVE9_AGENT_GROUP_MAPPING A
LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL B
ON A.AgentName_Five9	= B.Agent_Name
AND A.Division			= B.Division
WHERE B.Agent_Name IS NULL;

UPDATE B
SET B.ADP_EmployeeID = A.EmployeeID
FROM
(
	SELECT DISTINCT EmployeeID,FirstName,LastName,WorkEmail,Division 
	FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE 
	WHERE WorkEmail IS NOT NULL AND WorkEmail!=''
	) A

JOIN [EDW].[DIM_FIVE9_AGENT_GROUP_MAPPING] B
ON A.WorkEmail = B.Email_Five9
AND A.Division = B.Division
WHERE B.ADP_EmployeeID IS NULL;


--**********************************
--**********************************



UPDATE B
SET B.ADP_EmployeeID = A.EmployeeID
FROM
(
	SELECT DISTINCT EmployeeID,FirstName,LastName,WorkEmail,Division 
	FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE 
	) A


JOIN [EDW].[DIM_FIVE9_AGENT_GROUP_MAPPING] B
ON  A.FirstName = LEFT(B.AgentName_Five9, CHARINDEX(' ', B.AgentName_Five9 + ' ') - 1)
AND A.LastName	= RIGHT(B.AgentName_Five9, CHARINDEX(' ', REVERSE(B.AgentName_Five9) + ' ') - 1)
AND A.Division  = B.Division
WHERE B.ADP_EmployeeID IS NULL



--**********************************
--**********************************


UPDATE MX
SET MX.ADP_EmployeeID = A.EmployeeID
FROM
(
	SELECT DISTINCT EmployeeID,FirstName,LastName,WorkEmail,Division 
	FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE 
	) A

JOIN 
	(		
		SELECT M1.ADP_EmployeeID,M1.AgentName_Five9,M1.Division,M2.Email,M2.FirstName,M2.LastName 
		FROM  [EDW].[DIM_FIVE9_AGENT_GROUP_MAPPING] M1
		JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE M2
		ON M2.EmployeeID = M1.LP_EmployeeID 
		WHERE ADP_EmployeeID IS NULL
		)B
ON A.WorkEmail = B.Email
AND A.Division = B.Division

JOIN [EDW].[DIM_FIVE9_AGENT_GROUP_MAPPING] MX 
ON B.AgentName_Five9 = MX.AgentName_Five9
AND B.Division = MX.Division

WHERE MX.ADP_EmployeeID IS NULL;




--**********************************
--**********************************


UPDATE MX
SET MX.ADP_EmployeeID = A.EmployeeID
FROM
(
	SELECT DISTINCT EmployeeID,FirstName,LastName,WorkEmail,Division 
	FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE 
	) A

JOIN 
	(		
		SELECT M1.ADP_EmployeeID,M1.AgentName_Five9,M1.Division,M2.Email,M2.FirstName,M2.LastName 
		FROM  [EDW].[DIM_FIVE9_AGENT_GROUP_MAPPING] M1
		JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE M2
		ON M2.EmployeeID = M1.LP_EmployeeID 
		WHERE ADP_EmployeeID IS NULL
		)B

ON  A.FirstName = LEFT(B.AgentName_Five9, CHARINDEX(' ', B.AgentName_Five9 + ' ') - 1)
AND A.LastName	= RIGHT(B.AgentName_Five9, CHARINDEX(' ', REVERSE(B.AgentName_Five9) + ' ') - 1)
AND A.Division = B.Division


JOIN [EDW].[DIM_FIVE9_AGENT_GROUP_MAPPING] MX 
ON B.AgentName_Five9 = MX.AgentName_Five9
AND B.Division = MX.Division


WHERE MX.ADP_EmployeeID IS NULL;
